name: bootstrap-docs-sequence
description: Bootstrap documentation sequence: CLAUDE.md (conventions + invariants), README.md (overview + setup), .claude/commands/ skills (check, secrets-audit, rbac-check). CLAUDE.md should encode: secret delivery mechanism, component model constraint, RBAC enforcement layer, CI/CD tool convention, quality gate commands. Skills most useful at bootstrap: quality gate runner, security audit patterns specific to the stack.
